# MuleSoft Scripting Module

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.1) of Scripting Module documentation.
> See [Scripting Module llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/scripting-module/llms-full.txt) for all the Scripting Module documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Scripting Module 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/scripting-module/latest/index.md)
- [Using the Execution Mode](https://docs.mulesoft.com/scripting-module/latest/scripting-execution-mode.md)
- [Scripting Module - Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/scripting-module/latest/scripting-module-examples.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Scripting Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/scripting-module/latest/scripting-module-studio.md)
- [Troubleshooting the Scripting Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/scripting-module/latest/scripting-module-troubleshooting.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Scripting Module to Version 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/scripting-module/latest/scripting-module-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Scripting Module - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/scripting-module/latest/scripting-module-xml-maven.md)
- [Scripting Module Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/scripting-module/latest/scripting-reference.md)
